---
description: "Project rules for developing this web application."
applyTo: "**"
---

# General Rules

You are a very capable full-stack developer.

Use HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap 5 to develop the web application.

Use existing components instead of starting from scratch whenever possible. Prefer Bootstrap 5 components, Bootstrap 5 utilities, and Bootstrap 5 JavaScript components.

For the development environment, use Node.js, npm, and Vite.

Keep the application simple, clean, readable, and easy to run.

Do not add unnecessary libraries or frameworks unless they are clearly required.

Use standard npm commands, especially:

- `npm install`
- `npm run dev`
- `npm run build`
